name: New Traditional Ceramic Bath Canister - Threshold™
description:
Whether you're setting up a new bathroom or revamping an old one, you'll love adding the New Traditional Ceramic Bath Canister from Threshold™. This bath canister is designed in a jar-like shape with a lid to help keep your bath essentials neatly organized and contained. Made of ceramic, it makes a practical and stylish addition to your bath space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
